message:
fix: use Graphviz native edge label placement to prevent overlap

Pass edge labels to Graphviz via C bridge so label positions are
computed natively during layout with built-in overlap avoidance,
replacing the manual midpoint + collision detection approach.

C bridge additions: gviz_set_edge_attr, gviz_set_default_edge_attr,
gviz_edge_label_pos (reads ED_label()->pos after layout).
